calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-16-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerks: M. Vallejo/R. Edwards, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Petitioner: Rebecca Hallock Lunine, present with counsel Ian Kelley, Esq., present, was sworn and examined.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: BEN HALLOCK LUNINE; the Court further orders the gender changed from female to male.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-10-2004 Reset To Dec-16-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Anthony Vaughn.
Ian Kelly, Esq. for and with the Petitioner: Rebecca Hallock Lunine, was sworn and examined.
This matter is continued to Dec. 16, 2004 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218, for Medical Certificate by M.D., the appearance of the Petitioner is required.
